## Source: ghsa-malware (d9827965058f01ec3e66fcbdc4535f495204a620a07ac3687dd39853f9436814)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (3fa4a6c4b0b94b2b009c0377390aeee029c2d9024af134c4697f3c8cdfb1f916)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'investing_parameters' @ 1.2.1 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

It is considered malicious because:

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
